faqs.question: Why are cockroaches so common in Throgs Neck homes?
faqs.answer: Throgs Neck's waterfront location provides the moisture cockroaches need to thrive, while the neighborhood's mix of older homes and apartment buildings offers numerous entry points and hiding spots. The area's moderate climate and dense residential development create ideal conditions for German and American cockroaches to establish populations year-round.
